slots.prompt: Professional lifestyle photography, happy senior couple in their 60s walking hand-in-hand on a sunny beach at golden hour, warm amber tones, soft bokeh background, ultra realistic, commercial photography

slots.prompt: Portrait photo of a friendly senior woman in her late 60s, warm smile, casual blue cardigan, outdoor natural light, shallow depth of field, professional headshot style
